prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens on a nearly black screen, with only a small red watermark-like mark visible in the bottom-right corner.

It then cuts to a close-up of a glossy red sports car seen from the side, focusing on the side window and upper door area. The lighting is dark and dramatic, with the car’s surface reflecting red highlights.

A title graphic appears over a moving background: white stylized characters above the words “MIDNIGHT CLUB II.” The background shows a dark vehicle surface and a blurred roadway or city environment, suggesting speed and motion.

The next shots emphasize rapid urban movement. A city or roadway scene appears heavily motion-blurred, followed by an extreme close-up of a large orange-gold “R” shape with a dark outline, likely part of a logo. The frame is tightly cropped, so the full logo is not visible.

A car with bright headlights approaches on a dark road. This is followed by a wide, sunlit city skyline with tall buildings, elevated roads, and a bright low sun at the right side of the frame.

The commercial then shows a close-up of the front corner of a purple car: a large round headlight, chrome-like bumper, and shiny wheel are visible. Another shot appears to be from inside or near the front of a vehicle, looking through a windshield at a residential-looking street with a white fence; a green-and-white car passes across the frame. A rear-view mirror or interior reflection is visible, but details of the driver are unclear.

The imagery becomes more abstract and fast-moving, with blurred red and yellow lights against a dark city background. A later shot looks through vertical fence or railing bars at a car moving along a roadway or ramp, with city structures behind it. A bright headlight flare fills much of the next frame, obscuring details.

A low rear-side view shows a sports car driving through a city street, its red taillight glowing and its body reflecting street lighting. The car appears close to the camera and angled forward into the street.

Near the end, a car turns or slides through a nighttime intersection, producing a cloud of smoke or tire haze. A building with bright turquoise horizontal neon bands is visible in the background. An ESRB “T” rating icon appears at the bottom-left. Another city racing shot follows, showing cars moving quickly through a lit urban intersection with motion blur; the “T” rating remains visible at bottom-left.

The final frame is a black end card. It displays stylized characters above the title “MIDNIGHT CLUB II,” followed by “IN STORES NOW.” Along the bottom are several platform/publisher/rating logos, including an ESRB “T” rating, “PC CD-ROM,” Xbox Live, PlayStation 2, and Rockstar-related logos. A website is shown: “WWW.ROCKSTARGAMES.COM/MIDNIGHTCLUB2.”
